check.description: Run clippy on both targets and fmt check, fix all errors
check.template:
Run the following commands in the firmware/ directory and fix ALL errors. Iterate until every command passes.
1. cargo fmt --check (fix any formatting issues with cargo fmt)
2. cargo clippy --features rp2040 --target thumbv6m-none-eabi -- -D warnings
3. cargo clippy --no-default-features --features rp2350 --target thumbv8m.main-none-eabihf -- -D warnings
Fix any issues found, then commit and push.

ship.template: Use a subagent to review all uncommitted changes for correctness. Fix any issues found. Then run clippy and fmt for both RP2040 and RP2350 targets in the firmware/ directory. Fix all lint errors. Then commit all changes with a descriptive message and push to main.
